# inputKeys()

**Instance Method**

Returns an array that contains the keys that identify the input ports of the root patch of the composition.

## Declaration

```swift
func inputKeys() -> [Any]!
```

## Return Value

An array of keys associated with input ports.

## Getting Input and Output Keys

- **outputKeys()**: Returns an array that contains the keys that identify the output ports of the root patch of the composition.
